name: SIMKL
author: Chronicle Contributors
description: Metadata for Movies, TV, and Anime from SIMKL. Requires a free SIMKL API Client ID.
fixMatchHint: Paste a SIMKL URL (e.g. https://simkl.com/movies/2054273/birthrebirth) or a typed ID (e.g. simkl:movie:2054273).

background_tasks.description: Fetches full metadata (posters, overviews, ratings) from SIMKL for imported items that haven't been enriched yet.
Imports your complete SIMKL watch history, ratings, and watchlist from scratch. Safe to re-run — existing records are not duplicated.
background_tasks.run_confirmation_message: This pulls your entire SIMKL history and may take several minutes. Existing records will not be duplicated.

background_tasks.description: Fetches only new watch events, ratings, and watchlist changes from SIMKL since the last sync. Runs automatically on schedule.
